description: Address semantic review issues: fix dead localAIReply fallback, restrict CORS origin, add body size limit, cap context length server-side
steps: Fix keuangan-app.js kirimChatAI: replace try/catch with reply check for 'Error:' prefix to trigger localAIReply fallback
Fix netlify/functions/gemini.js: restrict CORS origin using process.env.URL with fallback to '*'
Fix netlify/functions/gemini.js: add body size limit check (50KB) before parsing JSON
Fix netlify/functions/gemini.js: cap financialContext to 10K chars server-side
acceptance_criteria: kirimChatAI falls back to localAIReply when callGeminiChat returns a string starting with 'Error:'
CORS origin uses process.env.URL when available, falling back to '*'
Requests with body larger than 50KB return 413 status
financialContext is truncated to 10000 characters server-side
